primary_variables.matched_definition: Permanent loss of function through full gene knockout (for example CRISPR KO or deletion).
evidence: To create an isogenic NF1 null cell line, we utilized CRISPR Cas9 targeting of NF1exon 2 to create inactivating indels in NF1 on both alleles
investigate Protein-Protein Interactors (PPIs) and the global proteome of NF1 wild type (+/+) and null (-/-) human immortalized Schwann cells (ipn97.4)

matched_class_path: gene modification or gain of function
primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: stably transfected NF1 -/- cells with tagged mNf1 cDNAs (either WT or variant)
Variants were introduced into shuttle vectors by utilization of synthetic DNA fragments
variant tagged mNf1 (G848R, R1276Q, R1809C, and delM992)

attributes.agent: mNf1 cDNA (WT and variants G848R, R1276Q, R1809C, delM992)
attributes.route_or_context: stable transfection into NF1 -/- ipn97.4 cells
evidence: The tagged constructs were transfected into the NF1 -/- ipn97.4 cells as follows. Cells were seeded at 7.5 × 105 cells per well in a 6 well plate. The following day cells were transfected with 2.5 ug of DNA
began selection with 500 ug/ml G418 for 14–21 days until there were enough to pick colonies for single-cell selection

control_arms: NF1 -/- stably transfected with WT mNf1 cDNA
case_arms: NF1 -/- stably transfected with variant mNf1 cDNAs (G848R, R1276Q, R1809C, delM992)
replicate_hints: We performed 3 replicates of each affinity purification
Each cell line (+/+, -/- WT, G848R, R1276Q, R1809C, and delM992) was sampled in triplicate.

evidence: We identified 148 proteins with differential expression levels based on genotype.
Each variant cDNA was compared to WT cDNA individually.

base_candidates_ranked.reason: Data-dependent acquisition (DDA) was used on a Q Exactive HFx and Velos Pro. Quantification was performed via spectral counting (N-SC), which is a label-free quantification (LFQ) approach.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The study explicitly uses Strep-tag affinity purification to identify protein-protein interactors (PPIs) using StrepTactin beads.
